title: hyptis capitata var. mariannarum
intro: Hyptis capitata var. mariannarum, also known as Marianna's bush or Mexican mint, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Hyptis capitata var. mariannarum can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
